name: Gil Rodriguez
description: LA-based slow fashion label specializing in elevated cotton basics. Gil Rodriguez cuts, sews, and knits the majority of its fabrics locally in Los Angeles, using high-quality cotton jersey and cotton twill with no polyester or nylon in its core collection.

products.name: Bellevue Tee
products.description: Super soft short-sleeve baby tee in 100% cotton baby rib, form-fitting with a flattering silhouette. Made in LA from locally knit fabric.

products.name: LaPointe Tank
products.description: Cotton baby rib spaghetti tank with a square neckline, form-fitting and flattering. Made in USA from locally sourced 100% cotton.

products.name: Lou Pant
products.description: Unisex drawcord pant in 100% enzyme-washed cotton twill that gets softer with every wash. Features front and back patch pockets, made in Los Angeles.

products.name: Capri Legging
products.description: High-waisted knee-length legging in cotton spandex jersey with a lightly sanded velvety finish. Wide elastic waistband, made in LA.

products.name: Matisse Scooped Tank
products.description: Scooped neckline tank in lightly sanded cotton spandex jersey with a plush feel. Hip-grazing length, made in USA from locally sourced fabric.

products.name: French 100 Brief
products.description: Classic French-cut brief in 100% cotton baby rib for ultimate breathability. Slightly high-cut fit, made in USA from locally knit cotton.
